globalStyle.motion: heavy bone dust, ash, cold mist, dark tendrils, no warm fire or holy light
globalStyle.topologyNote: Core effect silhouettes are authored as layered quad-friendly geometry/decal strips; transient particle trails remain lightweight runtime primitives.

Raise Bone Servant.animationFlow: rift opens -> dark energy erupts -> bones spiral upward -> binding burst -> servant revealed -> dust settles

Life Tap.animationFlow: energy gathers -> tendril lashes target -> life motes travel back -> caster pulses -> tendril fades

Bone Spear.animationFlow: fragments assemble -> spear launches/spins -> dust trail -> impact shatter -> shards settle

Rot Cloud.animationFlow: miasma erupts -> cloud spreads -> particles settle -> affected zone persists -> cloud thins

Grave Armor.animationFlow: mist gathers -> plates lock on -> bindings weave -> active armor shimmer -> plates crack/dissolve

Soul Leech.animationFlow: shadow vortex builds -> tendrils lash -> target is drained -> fragments return -> caster pulses -> tendrils snap back
